creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
An example: 

To: freebsd-status-calls@FreeBSD.org
Cc: freebsd-current@FreeBSD.org,freebsd-hackers@FreeBSD.org,devsummit@FreeBSD.org,secretary@asiabsdcon.org

I sought the archive of this email at <https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-status-calls/>, it's not there. 

Instead, I found it at <https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-current/2023-March/003301.html>
